name: Warm Flanger
explanation: A lush, warm analog-voiced flanger in the bucket-brigade tradition. A short fractional delay line is swept by a slow triangle LFO around a parked centre set by Manual; Width sets how far the comb sweeps, Rate the speed, and Regen the feedback. The feedback path is gently low-passed and softly saturated so heavy Regen thickens and resonates creamily instead of turning clangy. A small stereo LFO offset gives a gentle moving image. Controls: Manual, Width, Rate, Regen and dry/wet Mix.
